name: cherrystone/entry-cards
title: Two Ways In
description: Founder and member entry panels from the Cherrystone homepage.

default.title: Capital plus operators who have been in your seat.
default.body: One application. Real diligence by a member committee that has built, sold, and run companies. If we lead, we lead, and we stay engaged after the round.

default.title: Invest alongside experienced operators.
default.body: Members source, screen, and write checks together. Diverse expertise across life sciences, software, healthcare, fintech, and industrial tech.
